- Penicillin resistance has been documented since the early days of antibiotic use; current guidelines do not recommend it for treating gonorrhea.
- Current treatments rely on ceftriaxone or other cephalosporins due to widespread resistance.

Therefore, stating that "all strains" are susceptible contradicts known epidemiological data.
